name: Pinto Bean Soup with Mint & Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sunflower oil or light olive oil
4 slices of bacon, finely sliced and toasted in a dry pan
recipeInstructions:
1. SOAK THE BEANS overnight; drain.
2. Transfer beans to a large soup pot and cover with fresh water. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes, then drain and rinse.
3. Warm the oil in the soup pot. Add the onion and chile and briefly cook together.
4. Add the beans, 10 cups of water, and bring to a boil. Simmer until beans are tender (about 45 minutes for fresh beans; longer for older beans).
5. Season to taste with salt. Continue cooking until beans are completely soft.
6. Puree half the beans and cooking liquid at a time in a blender until smooth. Return puree to the pot.
7. Add the cream and reheat.
8. Chop toasted pine nuts finely. Stir in chopped herbs, reserving some chives.
9. Ladle soup into bowls and garnish with remaining chives and pine nuts.
